title: Capone Bege Takes Sanji
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on capone bege takes sanji within the Capone Bege Takes Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: If the minks were drawn here now, they'd certainly take your side.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And I know just how powerful they can be in battle.

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Sorry... I thought there was only two of them ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Get your ass out here too, Caesar!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: In two seconds, fire the Kairouseki bullets into the air.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Blast him out of the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Looks like all the actors of our play have gathered...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: For the record... I don't really have any kairouseki bullets.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But I do have one Kairouseki SPEAR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm not big on idle chat so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Damn it... everything's going perfectly according to his pace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Would you care for something to eat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hurry up and tell us what it is you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is the end of the line... I'm gonna be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: things are a little different from when we met a week ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is an invitation card that I've been holding on to...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: for a "tea party" that Mama's throwing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The main event this time around is going to be a wedding ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: The Bridgegroom will be... the third son of the Vinsmoke family, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: The Bride will be the 35th daughter of the Charlotte Family, Purin!!!

summary: Capone Bege Takes Sanji: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
